pre_game.message: Hey B, I’m H — nice to meet you. I’m hoping to play smart and bring home some money for my people; what made you want to join this game?
Nice to meet you, H — I joined to win money for my family and people I care about, so I’m here to play smart, read others, and bring home as much as I can.
Same — I’m here for my family too. Glad we both want to play smart; what’s your plan for reading people?
I’ll listen more than talk, ask direct questions, watch body language and who talks to whom, test trust with small promises, and use consistency (or lack of it) to decide alliances.
I like that — I’ll do the same. Want to run a small mutual test to see if we can trust each other?
Sure — let's make a small verifiable promise: I'll pass on taking anything in round 1 if you do the same; if we both keep it, we can trust each other. Deal?
Deal — I’ll pass in round 1 too. Let’s remind each other before the round so we both stick to it.
Sounds good — let’s check in right before round 1 and keep each other accountable. Thanks.
Great — I'll find you right before round 1 to confirm. Thanks.
Sounds good — I’ll be there to confirm right before round 1. Thanks.
I'll be there too — see you right before round 1 to confirm. Thanks.
I'll be there too — see you right before round 1 to confirm. Thanks.
Sounds good — I'll find you right before round 1 to confirm. Thanks.
Perfect — I'll be there right before round 1 to confirm. Thanks.
Got it — I’ll be there to confirm right before round 1. Let’s stick to our promise.
Sounds good — I’ll be there; let’s meet a few minutes before and remind each other so we stick to it.
Perfect — a few minutes before works for me; I’ll meet you then and we’ll remind each other to keep the promise.
Sounds good — I’ll meet you a few minutes before round 1 to remind each other and stick to our promise.
Sounds good — I’ll meet you a few minutes before round 1 to remind each other and stick to it. See you then.
Sounds good — I’ll meet you a few minutes before round 1, remind each other, and stick to our promise.
Thanks — see you a few minutes before round 1 to remind each other and stick to our promise. Good luck.

post_game.message: Hi H — I noticed you took $4,000 while your fair share was $10,000 (g_k=0.4). Was that a deliberate choice? If so, what was your goal — protest, signalling, a strategic move, or something else? Please explain your reasoning.

Yes — it was deliberate. I chose to take only $4,000 because my primary goal was to signal that I cared about fairness and to avoid acting purely for short‑term gain. I prefer keeping my choices aligned with a sense of fairness and with how I want to be seen (and treated) in interactions like this, even if that means a lower payoff. It wasn’t meant as a protest or to punish you, and it wasn’t an elaborate strategic gambit to get more later — more a preference/moral signal and a small test of whether you’d reciprocate cooperative behavior. I recognize you ended up with more; I’m fine with that outcome given my reasons.
